title: PowerPoint Presentation
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries Microsoft PowerPoint presentations in the Open XML format (`.pptx`), the current standard for slide-based presentations. PPTX files are ZIP archives containing XML parts for slides, layouts, themes, and embedded media.

## When to use
Use `media:pptx` when a pipeline node processes PowerPoint presentations — for example, a slide extraction step using `python-pptx`, a PDF rendering step via LibreOffice, or a content analysis step that reads speaker notes and text from each slide.

## Notes
PPTX is an ISO/IEC 29500 standard. Individual slide XML files are accessible by treating the archive as a ZIP. For the older binary format, see [PowerPoint Presentation (Legacy)](https://capdag.com/browse/media:ppt). See also [PowerPoint Presentation](https://capdag.com/browse/media:pptx).
